narrative:
Precinct Chesterhill/Marion (precinct in Morgan County) has 642 registered voters, with 46.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points.
